panels.q: How do I create an account?
panels.a: Click Sign Up in the header and follow the on-screen steps.

panels.q: How do I update my payment method?
panels.a: Go to Account Settings > Billing and edit your saved card.
Refunds are handled case by case - reach out via the Contact modal.

panels.q: How do I track my order?
panels.a: Use the tracking link emailed to you after checkout.
Standard shipping is 3-5 business days; express is 1-2 days.

panels.q: The page won't load, what do I do?
panels.a: Try clearing your browser cache or opening in a private window.
The latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari and Edge.
Not yet - this site is fully responsive on mobile browsers instead.

panels.q: How do I report a bug?
panels.a: Use the Contact modal in the header and describe the steps to reproduce.
Data is stored securely and never sold to third parties.

panels.q: How do I delete my account?
panels.a: Contact support and we will remove your data within 30 days.

panels.q: Do you offer discounts for students?
panels.a: Yes, reach out with a valid student email for a discount code.

panels.q: Where can I see your terms of service?
How do I unsubscribe from emails?
panels.a: Use the unsubscribe link at the bottom of any email we send.
